# SCORE Business Model Canvas Template

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, template-or-tool

## Resource purpose
Business model canvas worksheet for mapping the concept, customer, value proposition, channels, revenue, costs, partners, activities, and resources.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use as the first concrete worksheet for a raw idea-stage entrepreneur before entity formation, branding spend, or a full business plan.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Ideation and Validation

## Route the user here when
The user has an idea but not a clear model, customer, revenue logic, or operating requirements.

## BOSS routing notes
- Best early BOSS template for concept clarification.

## Related SCORE links
- Template Gallery: https://www.score.org/business-planning-financial-statements-template-gallery/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
